title: Heavy Cinnagar war suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Heavy_Cinnagar_war_suit.jpg|thumb|150px]]
The '''Heavy Cinnagar war suit''' was developed after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] for use by the military of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]. These suits were so well-made that they would still be used nearly one thousand years later during the [[Dark Wars]]. This form of armor possessed good durability, however it still retained the flexibility of medium armor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
